description: Legal fragment concerning a betrothal (qiddushin). The document is probably written by Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver and the validation is signed by him, along with Yehuda b. [...]. Dating: the period of the Nagid Shemuel b. Ḥananya, whose authority is referenced in l. 11 (r. 1140-1159 CE). The main document is witnessed by Saʿadya b. Mazhir and Yaʿaqov b. [...].
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
